title: Sales Engineer
description:
The Sales Engineer will be responsible for managing and growing existing customer accounts in Singapore and Malaysia. The role requires basic knowledge of mechanical drawings and close coordination with internal engineering and production teams. Ability to develop new business opportunities will be an added advantage.

Key Responsibilities

Customer Account Management

            •           Manage and maintain relationships with existing customers in Singapore and Malaysia

            •           Act as the main point of contact for technical and commercial matters

            •           Ensure customer satisfaction through timely follow-ups and support

            •           Drive repeat orders and long-term partnerships

Technical & Commercial Support

            •           Understand and review mechanical drawings and customer specifications

            •           Coordinate with engineering and production teams on feasibility, costing, and delivery

            •           Prepare quotations, proposals, and basic cost analysis

            •           Support customers during new part introduction and production stages

Sales Development (Added Advantage)

            •           Identify opportunities to increase business with existing customers

            •           Support management in developing new customers and markets

            •           Participate in sales visits, discussions, and presentations when required

Internal Coordination & Reporting

            •           Monitor order status, delivery schedules, and customer requirements

            •           Handle customer feedback, issues, and basic technical clarifications

            •           Prepare sales reports, forecasts, and account updates

· Ad hoc duties as assigned by management.

Qualifications & Experience

            •           Diploma or Degree in Mechanical Engineering or related discipline

            •           Minimum 2–5 years of experience in sales or engineering within a precision manufacturing environment

            •           Basic ability to read and understand mechanical drawings (GD&T knowledge is an advantage)

            •           Experience dealing with customers in Singapore and/or Malaysia preferred

Skills & Competencies

            •           Good communication and interpersonal skills

            •           Customer-oriented and service-minded

            •           Basic commercial and negotiation skills

            •           Willingness to travel within Singapore and Malaysia

            •           Proficient in MS Office

Benefit:

.  Annual Leave 14 – 21 days

.  Medical Claim $300 per year

.  AWS and Performance Bonus

.  Stable and Established Company

.  Working hours: Monday – Friday 8:30am – 6pm

.  Work location: Woodlands

postedCompany.description:
GENIC(SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.


Since its founding in 2002, the GENIC Group has been a company based in Asia that combines manufacturing and trading functions, specializing in " manufacturing and craftmanship".
